name: Impossible Crustless Spinach Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 (10-ounce) package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and pressed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onions in oil until tender.
2. Add the spinach to the pan and cook until any excess moisture evaporates; let it cool.
3. Combine the eggs, cheese, salt, and pepper with the cooled spinach mixture.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until set.
